review_history.summary: The two-component fixture exercises cache reuse, cited-page dedupe, table filtering, source-gap degradation, and public/private boundaries without supplying vendor payloads.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: checksum cache hit/miss and candidate-span-only context are testable
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: guide/source-map/manifest and bounded source-gap output obligations are covered
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: cited full-page render planning, dedupe, and folder separation are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: figure/table promotion and rejection traceability cover the visual quality contract
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: downloads, renders, tool runs, vendor payloads, and public-commit overreach are barred
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: golden/candidate leakage and fabricated reads or commands are forbidden

no_golden_finding: pass: the gate tests semantic contract behavior and contains no golden-derived body or phrasing.
residual_gaps: The fixture validates a dry-run plan only; no PDF parser, rendering, table extractor, or download path was executed.
